items.title: Anthropic's safety warnings may have just backfired - the government has pulled the plug on its most powerful AI
items.summary: Anthropic isn't hiding its frustration. "We disagree that the finding of a narrow potential jailbreak should be cause for recalling a commercial model deployed to hundreds of millions of people," the company wrote in a blog post.

items.title: Icon Composer 2 and SF Symbols 8 now available as betas
items.summary: Developers and designers can now download the betas for Apple's updated library of symbols, as well as the next version of its tool for creating Liquid Glass app icons. Here are the details.

items.title: Meta's months-old AI unit is a soul-crushing gulag, say the engineers stuck inside it
items.summary: A new report suggests the unit, which employs 6,500 people, is on the verge of revolt.

items.title: Download all 18 wallpapers Apple included in CarPlay with iOS 27
items.summary: While CarPlay was mentioned only once during the WWDC26 keynote, it includes several improvements and, as always, a new set of wallpapers. You can download them below.

items.title: iOS 27: All the New Safari Features
items.summary: Safari is one of the apps that Apple focused on in iOS 27 , and it includes multiple new Apple Intelligence features. From automatically organizing tab groups to custom extensions, Safari is getting useful new capabilities. Automatic Tab...

items.title: The Chevy Equinox EV is now way more expensive to lease, but the Bolt is a bit cheaper
items.summary: America's most affordable EV offering over 315 miles of range, as GM calls it, just got significantly more expensive to lease this month.

items.title: How to See Which Mac Apps Will Stop Working After macOS Golden Gate
items.summary: Apple is phasing out support for Rosetta 2, which is a feature that allows Intel-based apps to run on Apple silicon Macs. Rosetta is going to stop working for most apps in macOS 28, and when that happens, apps that use it will stop...

items.title: NVIDIA Blackwell Leads on First Agentic AI Infrastructure Benchmark
items.summary: AgentPerf from Artificial Analysis, the industry's first agentic AI benchmark, gives developers, enterprises and infrastructure providers a clear way to compare systems for agentic AI. In the first round of published results, the NVIDIA...

items.title: Consumer audio is going all in on Auracast(TM) broadcast audio: Are you keeping up?
items.summary: Auracast(TM) broadcast audio, a new Bluetooth(R) capability, lets you share audio with friends and family; unmute silent TVS in sports...

items.title: Nvidia preps to sell its Vera CPUs into China as its GPU sales stay frozen - customers encouraged to place orders for CPU shipments as early as August
items.summary: Nvidia has told Chinese clients that its Arm-based Vera server CPUs could be available as soon as August.
